flashcards.definition: Decomposes any periodic signal into a sum of sine and cosine waves at different frequencies.
Breaking a force F into components: F_x = F cos θ, F_y = F sin θ.
The additional phase lag needed to bring a system to instability; involves arctan.
Result of two waves with slightly different frequencies: amplitude varies at the difference frequency.
Z = R + jX; magnitude |Z| and phase angle θ = arctan(X/R).
